2026-07-01.body_en: Jesus invites the weary: come to Me, and I will give you rest. His yoke is easy because He carries the heavier end.
2026-07-01.body_sw: Yesu huwaalika waliochoka: njoni kwangu, nami nitawapumzisha. Nira yake ni laini kwa sababu yeye hubeba upande mzito zaidi.

2026-07-02.body_en: The Lord is my shepherd; He makes me lie down in green pastures. Sometimes rest is not weakness — it is obedience.
2026-07-02.body_sw: Bwana ndiye mchungaji wangu; hunilaza katika malisho ya majani mabichi. Wakati mwingine kupumzika si udhaifu — ni utii.

2026-07-03.body_en: God told Moses: My presence will go with you, and I will give you rest. Rest is not found in a place but in a Person.
2026-07-03.body_sw: Mungu alimwambia Musa: Uso wangu utakwenda pamoja nawe, nami nitakupa raha. Pumziko halipatikani mahali bali katika Nafsi.

2026-07-04.body_en: God rested on the seventh day and blessed it — not because He was tired, but because rest is holy. He built the rhythm; we ignore it at our cost.
2026-07-04.body_sw: Mungu alipumzika siku ya saba na kuibariki — si kwa kuwa alichoka, bali kwa sababu pumziko ni takatifu. Aliweka mdundo huo; kuupuuza ni hasara yetu.

2026-07-05.body_en: Jesus told His busy disciples: come aside to a deserted place and rest a while. Even ministry must pause to breathe.
2026-07-05.body_sw: Yesu aliwaambia wanafunzi wake wenye shughuli nyingi: njoni ninyi peke yenu mahali pa faragha mkapumzike kidogo. Hata huduma sharti itue kupumua.

2026-07-06.body_en: In returning and rest you shall be saved; in quietness and confidence shall be your strength. Hurry is not a fruit of the Spirit.
2026-07-06.body_sw: Kwa kurudi na kustarehe mtaokolewa; nguvu zenu zitakuwa katika kutulia na kutumaini. Haraka si tunda la Roho.

2026-07-07.body_en: It is vain to rise early and sit up late eating the bread of sorrows, for He gives His beloved sleep. Sleep is an act of trust — God runs the world while you rest.
2026-07-07.body_sw: Ni bure kuamka mapema na kukesha usiku mkila mkate wa huzuni, maana huwapa wapenzi wake usingizi. Usingizi ni tendo la imani — Mungu huendesha ulimwengu wakati unapumzika.

2026-07-08.body_en: There remains a rest for the people of God. The Sabbath is a weekly embassy of eternity — enter it gladly.
2026-07-08.body_sw: Basi, imesalia raha ya sabato kwa watu wa Mungu. Sabato ni ubalozi wa milele wa kila juma — ingia ndani yake kwa furaha.

2026-07-09.body_en: I will lie down in peace and sleep, for You alone, O Lord, make me dwell in safety. End each day by placing the night in His hands.
2026-07-09.body_sw: Katika amani nitajilaza na kulala, maana wewe, Bwana, peke yako ndiwe unijaliaye kukaa salama. Maliza kila siku kwa kuuweka usiku mikononi mwake.

2026-07-10.body_en: Do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will worry about its own things. God gives grace in daily portions, like manna.
2026-07-10.body_sw: Msisumbukie ya kesho, kwa kuwa kesho itajisumbukia yenyewe. Mungu hutoa neema kwa mafungu ya kila siku, kama mana.

2026-07-11.body_en: David calmed and quieted his soul like a weaned child with its mother. Contentment is learned — practice it in God's lap today.
2026-07-11.body_sw: Daudi alituliza na kunyamazisha nafsi yake kama mtoto aliyeachishwa pamoja na mama yake. Kuridhika hujifunzwa — kufanye leo mapajani mwa Mungu.

2026-07-12.body_en: Paul learned contentment in plenty and in want through Christ who strengthened him. Contentment is not having everything but being held by Everything's Owner.
2026-07-12.body_sw: Paulo alijifunza kuridhika katika kuwa na vingi na katika kupungukiwa kwa njia ya Kristo aliyemtia nguvu. Kuridhika si kuwa na kila kitu bali kushikwa na Mmiliki wa vyote.

2026-07-13.body_en: Truly my soul silently waits for God; from Him comes my salvation. In a noisy world, silent trust is a loud testimony.
2026-07-13.body_sw: Nafsi yangu inamngoja Mungu peke yake kwa kimya; wokovu wangu hutoka kwake. Katika ulimwengu wa kelele, imani ya kimya ni ushuhuda mkubwa.

2026-07-14.body_en: The work of righteousness shall be peace, and its effect quietness and assurance forever. Peace is not the absence of trouble but the presence of righteousness.
2026-07-14.body_sw: Kazi ya haki itakuwa amani, na mazao ya haki yatakuwa ni utulivu na matumaini daima. Amani si kutokuwepo kwa taabu bali kuwepo kwa haki.

2026-07-15.body_en: Jesus left us His own peace — not as the world gives. The world's peace depends on circumstances; His peace survives them.
2026-07-15.body_sw: Yesu alituachia amani yake mwenyewe — si kama ulimwengu utoavyo. Amani ya ulimwengu hutegemea mazingira; amani yake huyashinda.

2026-07-16.title_en: The Secret Place of the Most High
2026-07-16.title_sw: Mahali pa Siri pa Aliye Juu
2026-07-16.body_en: Whoever dwells in the secret place of the Most High abides under the shadow of the Almighty. Make God your habitation, not just your emergency exit.
2026-07-16.body_sw: Akaaye mahali pa siri pa Aliye juu atakaa katika uvuli wake Mwenyezi. Mfanye Mungu kuwa makao yako, si mlango wa dharura tu.

2026-07-17.body_en: The Lord is good, a stronghold in the day of trouble, and He knows those who trust in Him. Being known by God is better than knowing what comes next.
2026-07-17.body_sw: Bwana ni mwema, ni ngome siku ya taabu, naye huwajua hao wamkimbiliao. Kujulikana na Mungu ni bora kuliko kujua kitakachofuata.

2026-07-18.body_en: God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble; therefore we will not fear. His presence is never in the past tense.
2026-07-18.body_sw: Mungu ndiye kimbilio letu na nguvu zetu, msaada utakaoonekana tele wakati wa mateso; kwa hiyo hatutaogopa. Uwepo wake hauko katika wakati uliopita kamwe.

2026-07-19.body_en: Cast all your care upon Him, for He cares for you. The invitation is total — all your care, not just the manageable pieces.
2026-07-19.body_sw: Mkimtwika yeye fadhaa zenu zote, kwa maana yeye hujishughulisha sana kwa mambo yenu. Mwaliko ni kamili — fadhaa zenu zote, si zile ndogo tu.

2026-07-20.body_en: Rest in the Lord and wait patiently for Him; do not fret because of evildoers. Fretting changes nothing; trusting changes you.
2026-07-20.body_sw: Ukae kimya mbele za Bwana, na kumngojea kwa saburi; usikasirike kwa sababu ya mtu afanikiwaye katika njia yake. Kuhangaika hakubadilishi kitu; kutumaini hukubadilisha wewe.

2026-07-21.title_en: The Lord Will Fight for You
2026-07-21.body_en: The Lord will fight for you, and you shall hold your peace. Some victories require your stillness more than your strength.
2026-07-21.body_sw: Bwana atawapigania ninyi, nanyi mtanyamaza kimya. Ushindi mwingine huhitaji utulivu wako kuliko nguvu zako.

2026-07-22.body_en: Return to your rest, O my soul, for the Lord has dealt bountifully with you. When your soul wanders into worry, preach it back home.
2026-07-22.body_sw: Ee nafsi yangu, urudi rahani kwako, kwa kuwa Bwana amekutendea kwa ukarimu. Nafsi yako inapotanga-tanga katika wasiwasi, ihubirie irudi nyumbani.

2026-07-23.body_en: Like a shepherd He gathers the lambs in His arms and gently leads those with young. God's pace accounts for your burdens.
2026-07-23.body_sw: Kama mchungaji atawakusanya wana-kondoo mikononi mwake na kuwaongoza polepole wanaonyonyesha. Mwendo wa Mungu huzingatia mizigo yako.

2026-07-24.body_en: Jesus rebuked the storm, and there was a great calm. The same voice that stilled the sea can quiet your heart today.
2026-07-24.body_sw: Yesu aliikemea dhoruba, kukawa shwari kuu. Sauti ile ile iliyotuliza bahari yaweza kutuliza moyo wako leo.

2026-07-25.body_en: In the multitude of my anxieties within me, Your comforts delight my soul. God's comfort is sized to match your anxiety — multitude for multitude.
2026-07-25.body_sw: Katika wingi wa mawazo ya moyo wangu ndani yangu, faraja zako zaifurahisha roho yangu. Faraja ya Mungu ina kipimo cha kulingana na wasiwasi wako — wingi kwa wingi.

2026-07-26.body_en: Now may the Lord of peace Himself give you peace always in every way. He does not outsource peace — He gives it Himself.
2026-07-26.body_sw: Bwana wa amani mwenyewe awape amani sikuzote kwa njia zote. Hakabidhi amani kwa mwingine — huitoa yeye mwenyewe.

2026-07-27.body_en: I lay down and slept; I awoke, for the Lord sustained me. Every morning you wake is proof He kept watch all night.
2026-07-27.body_sw: Nalijilaza nikalala usingizi; naliamka, kwa kuwa Bwana ananitegemeza. Kila asubuhi unayoamka ni uthibitisho kwamba alikesha usiku kucha.

2026-07-28.body_en: Trust in the Lord forever, for in the Lord is everlasting strength. Anchors hold because of what they grip — grip the Rock.
2026-07-28.body_sw: Mtumainini Bwana milele, maana Bwana ndiye mwamba wa milele. Nanga hushika kwa sababu ya kile inachokishikilia — shika Mwamba.

2026-07-29.body_en: Look at the birds: they do not sow or reap, yet your heavenly Father feeds them. You are of more value than many sparrows — He will not forget you.
2026-07-29.body_sw: Waangalieni ndege wa angani: hawapandi wala hawavuni, na Baba yenu wa mbinguni huwalisha. Ninyi ni bora kupita shomoro wengi — hatawasahau.

2026-07-30.body_en: I have set the Lord always before me; because He is at my right hand I shall not be moved. Stability is a matter of position — keep Him before you.
2026-07-30.body_sw: Nimemweka Bwana mbele yangu daima; kwa kuwa yuko mkono wangu wa kuume sitaondoshwa. Uthabiti ni suala la mahali — mweke yeye mbele yako.

2026-07-31.body_en: In the world you will have tribulation, but be of good cheer — I have overcome the world. Jesus promises peace inside the storm, not exemption from it.
2026-07-31.body_sw: Ulimwenguni mnayo dhiki, lakini jipeni moyo — mimi nimeushinda ulimwengu. Yesu huahidi amani ndani ya dhoruba, si kinga dhidi yake.

2026-08-01.body_en: Be strong in the Lord and in the power of His might; put on the whole armor of God. The battle is real, but so is the armory.
2026-08-01.body_sw: Mwe hodari katika Bwana na katika uweza wa nguvu zake; vaeni silaha zote za Mungu. Vita ni kweli, lakini ghala la silaha pia ni kweli.

2026-08-02.body_en: The Lord your God goes with you to fight for you against your enemies, to save you. You never enter a battle He has not already entered first.
2026-08-02.body_sw: Bwana, Mungu wenu, ndiye anayekwenda pamoja nanyi kuwapigania juu ya adui zenu, ili kuwaokoa. Huingii vita ambavyo yeye hajaviingies kwanza.

2026-08-03.body_en: The Lord is my light and my salvation — whom shall I fear? Fear shrinks when God is measured accurately.
2026-08-03.body_sw: Bwana ni nuru yangu na wokovu wangu — nimwogope nani? Hofu hupungua Mungu anapopimwa kwa usahihi.

2026-08-04.body_en: No weapon formed against you shall prosper. Weapons may be formed — the promise is they will not prevail.
2026-08-04.body_sw: Kila silaha itakayofanyika juu yako haitafanikiwa. Silaha zaweza kufanyika — ahadi ni kwamba hazitashinda.

2026-08-05.body_en: Do not be afraid of this great multitude, for the battle is not yours but God's. Your part is faith and obedience; the outcome is His department.
2026-08-05.body_sw: Msiogope wala msifadhaike kwa ajili ya jeshi kubwa hili, kwani vita si vyenu bali ni vya Mungu. Sehemu yako ni imani na utii; matokeo ni idara yake.

2026-08-06.body_en: The Lord is my rock, my fortress, my deliverer, my shield, my stronghold. David stacked up metaphors because one was not enough — God is all of them.
2026-08-06.body_sw: Bwana ndiye jabali langu, na ngome yangu, na mwokozi wangu, na ngao yangu, na mnara wangu. Daudi alipanga mifano mingi kwa sababu mmoja haukutosha — Mungu ni yote hiyo.

2026-08-07.title_en: No One Shall Stand Against You
2026-08-07.body_en: As I was with Moses, so I will be with you; I will not leave you nor forsake you. God's presence is transferable across generations — including yours.
2026-08-07.body_sw: Kama nilivyokuwa pamoja na Musa, ndivyo nitakavyokuwa pamoja nawe; sitakupungukia wala sitakuacha. Uwepo wa Mungu huvuka vizazi — pamoja na chako.

2026-08-08.body_en: The Lord is my strength and my shield; my heart trusted in Him and I am helped. Notice the order: trust first, help follows.
2026-08-08.body_sw: Bwana ni nguvu zangu na ngao yangu; moyo wangu umemtumaini, nami nimesaidiwa. Angalia mpangilio: tumaini kwanza, msaada hufuata.

2026-08-09.body_en: Behold, God is my salvation; I will trust and not be afraid. Trust and fear are both choices — choose the one that has a promise.
2026-08-09.body_sw: Tazama, Mungu ndiye wokovu wangu; nitatumaini wala sitaogopa. Kutumaini na kuogopa yote ni machaguo — chagua lile lenye ahadi.

2026-08-10.body_en: My grace is sufficient for you, for My strength is made perfect in weakness. Your weak places are where God's power shows best.
2026-08-10.body_sw: Neema yangu yakutosha, maana uweza wangu hutimilika katika udhaifu. Sehemu zako dhaifu ndipo nguvu ya Mungu huonekana vizuri zaidi.

2026-08-11.body_en: In the day I cried out, You answered me, and made me bold with strength in my soul. Answered prayer breeds holy boldness.
2026-08-11.body_sw: Siku ile niliyokuita uliniitikia, ukanifariji nafsi kwa kunitia nguvu. Maombi yaliyojibiwa huzaa ujasiri mtakatifu.

2026-08-12.body_en: The three Hebrews trusted God to deliver them — but resolved to obey even if He did not. Faith worships before it sees the outcome.
2026-08-12.body_sw: Waebrania watatu walimwamini Mungu kuwaokoa — lakini waliazimia kutii hata kama hangewaokoa. Imani huabudu kabla ya kuona matokeo.

2026-08-13.body_en: Whenever I am afraid, I will trust in You. David did not deny fear; he decided what to do with it.
2026-08-13.body_sw: Siku ya hofu yangu nitakutumaini wewe. Daudi hakukana hofu; aliamua la kufanya nayo.

2026-08-14.body_en: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you; the rivers shall not overflow you. God does not always calm the flood, but He always enters it with you.
2026-08-14.body_sw: Upitapo katika maji mengi nitakuwa pamoja nawe; katika mito, haitakugharikisha. Mungu hatulizi gharika kila mara, lakini daima huingia ndani yake pamoja nawe.

2026-08-15.body_en: If God is for us, who can be against us? Count your opposition honestly — then count God, and recount.
2026-08-15.body_sw: Mungu akiwapo upande wetu, ni nani aliye juu yetu? Hesabu wapinzani wako kwa uaminifu — kisha mhesabu Mungu, uhesabu upya.

2026-08-16.body_en: Blessed be the Lord my Rock, who trains my hands for war. God does not just shelter His people; He strengthens them.
2026-08-16.body_sw: Na ahimidiwe Bwana, mwamba wangu, anifundishaye mikono yangu vita. Mungu hawahifadhi watu wake tu; huwatia nguvu.

2026-08-17.body_en: Do not sorrow, for the joy of the Lord is your strength. Joy is not a luxury for the believer — it is armor.
2026-08-17.body_sw: Msihuzunike, kwa kuwa furaha ya Bwana ni nguvu zenu. Furaha si anasa kwa muumini — ni silaha.

2026-08-18.body_en: When my heart is overwhelmed, lead me to the rock that is higher than I. Overwhelm is an invitation to climb higher than yourself.
2026-08-18.body_sw: Moyo wangu ukizimia, uniongoze juu ya mwamba nisioweza kuupanda mimi. Kuzidiwa ni mwaliko wa kupanda juu kuliko nafsi yako.

2026-08-19.body_en: The Lord God is my strength; He makes my feet like deer's feet on high places. God gives sure footing exactly where the terrain is most dangerous.
2026-08-19.body_sw: Bwana Mungu ndiye nguvu zangu; huifanya miguu yangu kuwa kama ya kulungu mahali palipoinuka. Mungu hutoa hatua thabiti mahali ambapo ardhi ni hatari zaidi.

2026-08-20.body_en: Watch, stand fast in the faith, be brave, be strong. Courage in Scripture is commanded — which means it is also enabled.
2026-08-20.body_sw: Kesheni, simameni imara katika imani, fanyeni kiume, mkawe hodari. Ujasiri katika Maandiko umeamriwa — maana yake pia umewezeshwa.

2026-08-21.title_en: God the Strength of My Heart
2026-08-21.body_en: My flesh and my heart fail, but God is the strength of my heart and my portion forever. When your reserves run out, His are just beginning.
2026-08-21.body_sw: Mwili wangu na moyo wangu hupunguka, bali Mungu ni nguvu za moyo wangu na sehemu yangu milele. Akiba zako zinapokwisha, zake ndipo zinaanza.

2026-08-22.title_en: Though I Fall, I Will Arise
2026-08-22.body_en: Do not rejoice over me, my enemy; when I fall, I will arise. Resilience is a fruit of faith — the story is not over.
2026-08-22.body_sw: Usinifurahie, adui yangu; nijapoanguka, nitasimama tena. Ustahimilivu ni tunda la imani — hadithi haijaisha.

2026-08-23.body_en: The Lord is my strength and song, and He has become my salvation. Israel sang on the far shore — your deliverance deserves a melody too.
2026-08-23.body_sw: Bwana ni nguvu zangu na wimbo wangu, naye amekuwa wokovu wangu. Israeli waliimba ng'ambo ya bahari — ukombozi wako nao unastahili wimbo.

2026-08-24.title_en: The Lord Is on My Side
2026-08-24.body_en: The Lord is on my side; I will not fear. What can man do to me? Man's worst is temporary; God's best is eternal.
2026-08-24.body_sw: Bwana yuko upande wangu; sitaogopa. Mwanadamu atanitenda nini? Baya zaidi la mwanadamu ni la muda; jema zaidi la Mungu ni la milele.

2026-08-25.body_en: I, the Lord your God, will hold your right hand, saying to you: fear not, I will help you. God does not shout instructions from a distance — He holds on.
2026-08-25.body_sw: Mimi, Bwana, Mungu wako, nitakushika mkono wako wa kuume, nikikuambia: usiogope, mimi nitakusaidia. Mungu hapigi kelele za maelekezo kwa mbali — hushika mkono.

2026-08-26.body_en: When everyone deserted Paul, the Lord stood with him and strengthened him. Human support may fail; His attendance is guaranteed.
2026-08-26.body_sw: Wote walipomwacha Paulo, Bwana alisimama pamoja naye akamtia nguvu. Msaada wa wanadamu waweza kukosekana; kuwepo kwake ni hakika.

2026-08-27.body_en: The Lord will give strength to His people; the Lord will bless His people with peace. He gives both the muscle for the battle and the calm after it.
2026-08-27.body_sw: Bwana atawapa watu wake nguvu; Bwana atawabariki watu wake kwa amani. Hutoa misuli kwa vita na utulivu baada yake.

2026-08-28.body_en: The angel called fearful Gideon a mighty man of valor — before he had done anything brave. God names your potential, not your past.
2026-08-28.body_sw: Malaika alimwita Gideoni mwenye hofu shujaa — kabla hajafanya jambo lolote la kishujaa. Mungu hutaja uwezo wako, si historia yako.

2026-08-29.body_en: The God of Israel is He who gives strength and power to His people. Strength is His gift, not your achievement — receive it fresh today.
2026-08-29.body_sw: Mungu wa Israeli ndiye awapaye watu wake nguvu na uwezo. Nguvu ni zawadi yake, si mafanikio yako — ipokee mpya leo.

2026-08-30.body_en: The boldness of unschooled Peter and John was traced to one thing: they had been with Jesus. Time in His presence is the school of courage.
2026-08-30.body_sw: Ujasiri wa Petro na Yohana wasiosoma ulionekana kutokana na jambo moja: walikuwa pamoja na Yesu. Muda mbele zake ni shule ya ujasiri.

2026-08-31.body_en: Be of good courage, and He shall strengthen your heart, all you who hope in the Lord. Close this month braver than you began it.
2026-08-31.body_sw: Uwe hodari, mtiwe nguvu mioyoni mwenu, ninyi nyote mnaomngoja Bwana. Funga mwezi huu ukiwa jasiri kuliko ulivyouanza.

2026-09-01.body_en: You are the light of the world — let your light shine so others glorify your Father. A hidden lamp helps no one; shine where you are placed.
2026-09-01.body_sw: Ninyi ni nuru ya ulimwengu — nuru yenu na iangaze ili wengine wamtukuze Baba yenu. Taa iliyofichwa haimsaidii mtu; angaza mahali ulipowekwa.

2026-09-02.body_en: Go into all the world and preach the gospel to every creature. The commission is global, but it starts at your doorstep.
2026-09-02.body_sw: Enendeni ulimwenguni mwote, mkaihubiri Injili kwa kila kiumbe. Agizo ni la ulimwengu wote, lakini huanzia mlangoni pako.

2026-09-03.body_en: When Isaiah saw the Lord, his response was immediate: here am I, send me. Vision of God always leads to mission for God.
2026-09-03.body_sw: Isaya alipomwona Bwana, jibu lake lilikuwa la papo hapo: mimi hapa, nitume mimi. Kumwona Mungu daima huelekeza katika utume wa Mungu.

2026-09-04.title_sw: Kwa Mmoja wa Hawa Walio Wadogo
2026-09-04.body_en: Whatever you did for one of the least of these, you did for Me. Jesus receives personally every kindness given in His name.
2026-09-04.body_sw: Kadiri mlivyomtendea mmojawapo wa hao ndugu zangu walio wadogo, mlinitendea mimi. Yesu hupokea binafsi kila wema unaotolewa kwa jina lake.

2026-09-05.body_en: Through love serve one another. Freedom in Christ is not freedom from service but freedom for it.
2026-09-05.body_sw: Kwa upendo mtumikiane. Uhuru katika Kristo si uhuru wa kuacha kutumika bali ni uhuru wa kutumika.

2026-09-06.body_en: If your Lord washed feet, no task is beneath you. Greatness in God's kingdom stoops.
2026-09-06.body_sw: Ikiwa Bwana wako aliosha miguu, hakuna kazi iliyo chini ya hadhi yako. Ukuu katika ufalme wa Mungu huinama.

2026-09-07.body_en: Remember the words of the Lord Jesus: it is more blessed to give than to receive. Generosity is not loss — it is the higher blessing.
2026-09-07.body_sw: Kumbukeni maneno ya Bwana Yesu: ni heri kutoa kuliko kupokea. Ukarimu si hasara — ni baraka iliyo kuu zaidi.

2026-09-08.body_en: Always be ready to give a reason for the hope in you, with meekness and fear. Your testimony needs no degree — only honesty and gentleness.
2026-09-08.body_sw: Mwe tayari sikuzote kumjibu kila mtu awaulizaye habari za tumaini lililo ndani yenu, kwa upole na hofu. Ushuhuda wako hauhitaji shahada — bali unyofu na upole tu.

2026-09-09.body_en: The harvest is plentiful but the laborers are few; pray the Lord of the harvest to send workers. Then be ready — such prayers often recruit the one praying.
2026-09-09.body_sw: Mavuno ni mengi, lakini watenda kazi ni wachache; mwombeni Bwana wa mavuno apeleke watenda kazi. Kisha uwe tayari — maombi kama hayo mara nyingi humwajiri anayeomba.

2026-09-10.body_en: I am not ashamed of the gospel, for it is the power of God to salvation. The gospel needs witnesses, not defenders — it carries its own power.
2026-09-10.body_sw: Siionei haya Injili, kwa maana ni uweza wa Mungu uuletao wokovu. Injili huhitaji mashahidi, si watetezi — hubeba nguvu yake yenyewe.

2026-09-11.body_en: We are ambassadors for Christ, as though God were pleading through us. You may be the only Bible someone reads today.
2026-09-11.body_sw: Sisi tu wajumbe kwa ajili ya Kristo, kana kwamba Mungu anasihi kwa vinywa vyetu. Huenda ukawa Biblia pekee mtu atakayoisoma leo.

2026-09-12.body_en: Go therefore and make disciples of all nations — and lo, I am with you always. The command comes wrapped in a promise of presence.
2026-09-12.body_sw: Basi, enendeni, mkawafanye mataifa yote kuwa wanafunzi — na tazama, mimi nipo pamoja nanyi siku zote. Amri huja imefungwa katika ahadi ya uwepo.

2026-09-13.body_en: The fruit of the righteous is a tree of life, and he who wins souls is wise. No investment outlasts a soul brought to Christ.
2026-09-13.body_sw: Tunda la mwenye haki ni mti wa uzima, naye apataye nafsi za watu ni mwenye hekima. Hakuna uwekezaji unaodumu kuliko roho iliyoletwa kwa Kristo.

2026-09-14.body_en: You shall be witnesses to Me in Jerusalem, Judea, Samaria, and to the end of the earth. Witness begins at home and widens in circles.
2026-09-14.body_sw: Mtakuwa mashahidi wangu katika Yerusalemu, Uyahudi, Samaria, na hata mwisho wa nchi. Ushuhuda huanzia nyumbani na kupanuka kwa miduara.

2026-09-15.body_en: There is joy in heaven over one sinner who repents. Heaven throws parties for what earth overlooks — never despise small beginnings.
2026-09-15.body_sw: Kuna furaha mbinguni kwa ajili ya mwenye dhambi mmoja atubuye. Mbingu hufanya sherehe kwa kile ambacho dunia hukipuuza — usidharau mianzo midogo.

2026-09-16.body_en: Faith by itself, without works, is dead. Your beliefs become believable when they become visible.
2026-09-16.body_sw: Imani, isipokuwa ina matendo, imekufa nafsini mwake. Imani yako huaminika inapoonekana.

2026-09-17.body_en: Bear one another's burdens, and so fulfill the law of Christ. Look around today — someone near you is carrying too much alone.
2026-09-17.body_sw: Mchukuliane mizigo na kuitimiza hivyo sheria ya Kristo. Tazama pande zote leo — mtu aliye karibu nawe anabeba mzigo mkubwa peke yake.

2026-09-18.title_en: Do Not Forget to Do Good
2026-09-18.body_en: Do not forget to do good and to share, for with such sacrifices God is well pleased. Kindness is a liturgy God loves.
2026-09-18.body_sw: Msisahau kutenda mema na kushirikiana; maana sadaka kama hizo ndizo zimpendezazo Mungu. Wema ni ibada ambayo Mungu huipenda.

2026-09-19.body_en: Even a cup of cold water given in Jesus' name will not lose its reward. No act of love is too small for heaven's bookkeeping.
2026-09-19.body_sw: Hata kikombe cha maji baridi kilichotolewa kwa jina la Yesu hakitakosa thawabu yake. Hakuna tendo la upendo dogo mno kwa hesabu za mbinguni.

2026-09-20.body_en: If you extend your soul to the hungry, your light shall dawn in the darkness. Serving others is how God often heals the server.
2026-09-20.body_sw: Ukimkunjulia mtu mwenye njaa nafsi yako, ndipo nuru yako itakapopambazuka gizani. Kuwahudumia wengine ndivyo Mungu mara nyingi humponya mhudumu.

2026-09-21.body_en: Be steadfast, always abounding in the work of the Lord, knowing your labor is not in vain. God keeps records that eternity will publish.
2026-09-21.body_sw: Mwimarike, sikuzote mkizidi sana katika kazi ya Bwana, mkijua ya kuwa taabu yenu si bure. Mungu hutunza kumbukumbu ambazo umilele utazichapisha.

2026-09-22.body_en: Paul prayed that the sharing of faith would become effective by acknowledging every good thing in Christ. Faith grows in the telling of it.
2026-09-22.body_sw: Paulo aliomba kwamba ushirika wa imani uwe na nguvu kwa kujua kila kitu chema kilicho ndani yetu katika Kristo. Imani hukua inaposhuhudiwa.

2026-09-23.body_en: Those who turn many to righteousness will shine like the stars forever and ever. Soul-winners have the longest-lasting glory in the universe.
2026-09-23.body_sw: Wale waongozao wengi kutenda haki watang'aa kama nyota milele na milele. Wavutao roho wana utukufu udumuo zaidi katika ulimwengu.

2026-09-24.body_en: The Samaritan saw, had compassion, and acted. Compassion that does not cross the road is only sentiment.
2026-09-24.body_sw: Msamaria aliona, akahurumia, akatenda. Huruma isiyovuka barabara ni hisia tu.

2026-09-25.body_en: Whoever desires to be great must be a servant — even the Son of Man came to serve. In God's kingdom the ladder of greatness goes downward.
2026-09-25.body_sw: Yeyote atakaye kuwa mkubwa lazima awe mtumishi — hata Mwana wa Adamu alikuja kutumika. Katika ufalme wa Mungu ngazi ya ukuu huelekea chini.

2026-09-26.body_en: How shall they hear without a preacher? How beautiful are the feet of those who preach the gospel of peace. Someone once carried the good news to you — carry it on.
2026-09-26.body_sw: Watasikiaje pasipo mhubiri? Ni mizuri kama nini miguu yao wahubirio habari njema ya amani. Mtu fulani aliwahi kukuletea habari njema — ipeleke mbele.

2026-09-27.body_en: Cast your bread upon the waters, for you will find it after many days. Sow generously and patiently — God manages the returns.
2026-09-27.body_sw: Tupa mkate wako juu ya maji, maana utauona baada ya siku nyingi. Panda kwa ukarimu na saburi — Mungu husimamia mavuno.

2026-09-28.body_en: Lift up your eyes and look at the fields, for they are already white for harvest. Opportunity is not coming someday — it is ripe now.
2026-09-28.body_sw: Inueni macho yenu myatazame mashamba, ya kuwa yamekwisha kuwa meupe, tayari kwa mavuno. Fursa haiji siku fulani — imeiva sasa.

2026-09-29.body_en: Let no one despise your youth, but be an example in word, conduct, love, spirit, faith, purity. Influence is not measured in years but in faithfulness.
2026-09-29.body_sw: Mtu awaye yote asiudharau ujana wako, bali uwe kielelezo kwa neno, mwenendo, upendo, roho, imani na usafi. Ushawishi haupimwi kwa miaka bali kwa uaminifu.

2026-09-30.body_en: Walk in wisdom toward outsiders; let your speech always be with grace, seasoned with salt. Gracious words open doors that arguments cannot.
2026-09-30.body_sw: Enendeni kwa hekima mbele yao walio nje; maneno yenu yawe na neema sikuzote, yakikolea chumvi. Maneno ya neema hufungua milango ambayo mabishano hayawezi.

2026-10-01.body_en: Enter His gates with thanksgiving and His courts with praise. Gratitude is the doorway to God's presence — start this month at the gate.
2026-10-01.body_sw: Ingieni malangoni mwake kwa kushukuru, nyuani mwake kwa kusifu. Shukrani ni mlango wa uwepo wa Mungu — anza mwezi huu langoni.

2026-10-02.body_en: In everything give thanks, for this is the will of God for you in Christ Jesus. Thanksgiving is commanded in everything, not for everything — He is good in it all.
2026-10-02.body_sw: Shukuruni kwa kila jambo, maana hayo ni mapenzi ya Mungu kwenu katika Kristo Yesu. Shukrani imeamriwa katika kila jambo, si kwa kila jambo — yeye ni mwema ndani ya yote.

2026-10-03.body_en: Bless the Lord, O my soul, and forget not all His benefits. Memory is the mother of gratitude — count yesterday's mercies today.
2026-10-03.body_sw: Ee nafsi yangu, umhimidi Bwana, wala usizisahau fadhili zake zote. Kumbukumbu ni mama wa shukrani — hesabu rehema za jana leo.

2026-10-04.body_en: I will bless the Lord at all times; His praise shall continually be in my mouth. David wrote this while fleeing for his life — praise is not weather-dependent.
2026-10-04.body_sw: Nitamhimidi Bwana kila wakati; sifa zake zi kinywani mwangu daima. Daudi aliandika haya akikimbia kuokoa maisha yake — sifa haitegemei hali ya hewa.

2026-10-05.body_en: Though the fig tree does not blossom, yet I will rejoice in the Lord. Faith praises God for who He is when it cannot see what He is doing.
2026-10-05.body_sw: Ujapokuwa mtini hautachanua maua, hata hivyo nitamfurahia Bwana. Imani humsifu Mungu kwa jinsi alivyo hata isipoona anachokifanya.

2026-10-06.title_en: Give Thanks, for He Is Good
2026-10-06.body_en: Oh, give thanks to the Lord, for He is good, for His mercy endures forever. Goodness is not what God does occasionally — it is who He is eternally.
2026-10-06.body_sw: Mshukuruni Bwana, kwa maana ni mwema, kwa maana fadhili zake ni za milele. Wema si kitu Mungu hufanya mara chache — ni jinsi alivyo milele.

2026-10-07.body_en: Let the peace of God rule in your hearts — and be thankful. Paul mentions thankfulness three times in three verses; make it triple-strength today.
2026-10-07.body_sw: Amani ya Mungu iamue mioyoni mwenu — tena iweni watu wa shukrani. Paulo hutaja shukrani mara tatu katika mistari mitatu; ifanye maradufu leo.

2026-10-08.body_en: It is good to give thanks to the Lord — to declare His lovingkindness in the morning and His faithfulness every night. Bracket your day with praise.
2026-10-08.body_sw: Ni vema kumshukuru Bwana — kuzitangaza rehema zako asubuhi, na uaminifu wako wakati wa usiku. Funga siku yako pande zote mbili kwa sifa.

2026-10-09.body_en: Ten lepers were healed; one returned to give thanks. Do not let answered prayers go unthanked — be the one who comes back.
2026-10-09.body_sw: Wakoma kumi walitakaswa; mmoja alirudi kushukuru. Usiache maombi yaliyojibiwa bila shukrani — uwe yule anayerudi.

2026-10-10.body_en: Let everything that has breath praise the Lord. If you are breathing today, you are qualified — and invited.
2026-10-10.body_sw: Kila mwenye pumzi na amsifu Bwana. Ikiwa unapumua leo, unastahili — na umealikwa.

2026-10-11.body_en: From the fish's belly Jonah vowed the sacrifice of thanksgiving. Praise offered in the dark costs more — and means more.
2026-10-11.body_sw: Kutoka tumbo la samaki Yona aliweka nadhiri ya dhabihu ya shukrani. Sifa itolewayo gizani hugharimu zaidi — na ina maana zaidi.

2026-10-12.body_en: Sing to the Lord a new song; declare His glory among the nations. Fresh mercies deserve fresh music — do not recycle yesterday's praise.
2026-10-12.body_sw: Mwimbieni Bwana wimbo mpya; wahubirini mataifa habari za utukufu wake. Rehema mpya zastahili wimbo mpya — usirudie sifa za jana tu.

2026-10-13.body_en: At midnight Paul and Silas prayed and sang, and the prisoners heard them. Praise in prison preaches louder than sermons in comfort.
2026-10-13.body_sw: Usiku wa manane Paulo na Sila walikuwa wakiomba na kuimba, na wafungwa waliwasikiliza. Sifa gerezani huhubiri kwa nguvu kuliko mahubiri ya starehe.

2026-10-14.body_en: You have turned my mourning into dancing; You have put off my sackcloth and clothed me with gladness. God specializes in reversals — thank Him for the ones you have seen.
2026-10-14.body_sw: Umenigeuzia maombolezo yangu kuwa machezo; umenivika furaha. Mungu ni hodari wa mageuzi — mshukuru kwa yale uliyokwisha yaona.

2026-10-15.body_en: When you have eaten and are full, bless the Lord — beware lest you forget Him. Prosperity is a harder test than poverty; gratitude is the safeguard.
2026-10-15.body_sw: Utakapokula na kushiba, umhimidi Bwana — jihadhari usije ukamsahau. Ufanisi ni mtihani mgumu kuliko umaskini; shukrani ndiyo kinga.

2026-10-16.body_en: Oh come, let us sing to the Lord! Let us come before His presence with thanksgiving. Worship is a summons with joy written all over it.
2026-10-16.body_sw: Njoni, tumwimbie Bwana! Tuje mbele zake kwa shukrani. Ibada ni wito uliojaa furaha kila upande.

2026-10-17.body_en: Give thanks always for all things to God the Father in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Gratitude is not an event on the calendar but a posture of the heart.
2026-10-17.body_sw: Mkimshukuru Mungu Baba sikuzote kwa mambo yote, katika jina lake Bwana wetu Yesu Kristo. Shukrani si tukio la kalenda bali mkao wa moyo.

2026-10-18.body_en: What shall I render to the Lord for all His benefits toward me? The question itself is worship — live today as your answer.
2026-10-18.body_sw: Nimlipe Bwana nini kwa ukarimu wake wote alionitendea? Swali lenyewe ni ibada — ishi leo kama jibu lako.

2026-10-19.body_en: Oh, give thanks to the Lord, for He is good! For His mercy endures forever. Israel sang this bringing the ark home — sing it bringing your day to God.
2026-10-19.body_sw: Mshukuruni Bwana kwa kuwa ni mwema; kwa maana fadhili zake ni za milele. Israeli waliimba haya wakileta sanduku nyumbani — yaimbe ukileta siku yako kwa Mungu.

2026-10-20.body_en: The psalm begins with 'How long, O Lord?' and ends with singing. Honest lament that keeps trusting always finds its way to praise.
2026-10-20.body_sw: Zaburi huanza na 'Hata lini, Ee Bwana?' na kumalizika kwa kuimba. Maombolezo ya kweli yanayoendelea kutumaini daima hufika kwenye sifa.

2026-10-21.body_en: You are worthy, O Lord, to receive glory and honor and power, for You created all things. Heaven's constant song can start on earth — in your mouth today.
2026-10-21.body_sw: Umestahili wewe, Bwana, kuupokea utukufu na heshima na uweza, kwa kuwa wewe ndiwe uliyeviumba vitu vyote. Wimbo wa daima wa mbinguni waweza kuanzia duniani — kinywani mwako leo.

2026-10-22.body_en: My mouth shall praise You with joyful lips when I remember You on my bed. Let the last thoughts of your day be thanksgiving, not scrolling.
2026-10-22.body_sw: Kinywa changu kitakusifu kwa midomo ya furaha ninapokukumbuka kitandani mwangu. Acha mawazo ya mwisho ya siku yako yawe shukrani, si kupitia habari.

2026-10-23.body_en: Praise the Lord, call upon His name, declare His deeds among the peoples. Gratitude that stays private is only half grown — testify.
2026-10-23.body_sw: Msifuni Bwana, liitieni jina lake, yatangazeni matendo yake kati ya mataifa. Shukrani ibakiayo faraghani imekua nusu tu — shuhudia.

2026-10-24.body_en: God is holy, enthroned in the praises of Israel. Praise builds a throne room — worship makes space for the King.
2026-10-24.body_sw: Mungu ni mtakatifu, umeketi juu ya sifa za Israeli. Sifa hujenga chumba cha enzi — ibada humtengenezea Mfalme nafasi.

2026-10-25.body_en: Daniel blessed God who gives wisdom to the wise and reveals deep and secret things. When God answers, pause to praise before you proceed.
2026-10-25.body_sw: Danieli alimhimidi Mungu awapaye hekima wenye hekima na kufunua mambo ya ndani na ya siri. Mungu ajibupo, tua kusifu kabla ya kuendelea.

2026-10-26.body_en: Praise the Lord, for it is good to sing praises to our God; it is pleasant, and praise is beautiful. Praise fits the redeemed like a well-made garment.
2026-10-26.body_sw: Msifuni Bwana, maana ni vema kumwimbia Mungu wetu; naam, kusifu ni kuzuri na kwapendeza. Sifa huwakaa waliokombolewa kama vazi lililoshonwa vyema.

2026-10-27.body_en: Mary sang: my soul magnifies the Lord, and my spirit rejoices in God my Saviour. Magnifying God does not make Him bigger — it makes your view of Him truer.
2026-10-27.body_sw: Mariamu aliimba: moyo wangu wamwadhimisha Bwana, na roho yangu inamfurahia Mungu, Mwokozi wangu. Kumwadhimisha Mungu hakumfanyi mkubwa zaidi — hufanya mtazamo wako kwake kuwa wa kweli zaidi.

2026-10-28.body_en: I will hope continually, and will praise You yet more and more. Gratitude has no ceiling — there is always another mercy to name.
2026-10-28.body_sw: Nitatumaini daima, nitakusifu, nikizidisha sifa zako zote. Shukrani haina dari — daima kuna rehema nyingine ya kuitaja.

2026-10-29.body_en: Thanks be to God for His indescribable gift. When words run out, gratitude keeps going — Christ is a gift beyond vocabulary.
2026-10-29.body_sw: Ashukuriwe Mungu kwa karama yake isiyoneneka. Maneno yakiisha, shukrani huendelea — Kristo ni zawadi ipitayo msamiati.

2026-10-30.body_en: I will praise You, O Lord, with my whole heart; I will tell of all Your marvelous works. Halfhearted praise honors neither the giver nor the Gift.
2026-10-30.body_sw: Nitakushukuru, Bwana, kwa moyo wangu wote; nitayasimulia matendo yako yote ya ajabu. Sifa ya nusu moyo haimheshimu mtoaji wala Zawadi.

2026-10-31.title_en: Who Can Utter His Mighty Acts
2026-10-31.body_en: Who can utter the mighty acts of the Lord, or declare all His praise? The inventory of God's goodness cannot be completed — but it is joy to try.
2026-10-31.body_sw: Nani awezaye kuyanena matendo makuu ya Bwana, na kuzitangaza sifa zake zote? Orodha ya wema wa Mungu haiwezi kukamilika — lakini ni furaha kujaribu.

2026-11-01.body_en: May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, that you may abound in hope. Hope is not wishful thinking — it is confidence in a faithful God.
2026-11-01.body_sw: Mungu wa tumaini na awajaze furaha yote na amani katika kuamini, mpate kuzidi sana kuwa na tumaini. Tumaini si ndoto za mchana — ni uhakika katika Mungu mwaminifu.

2026-11-02.body_en: Hope is an anchor of the soul, sure and steadfast, entering behind the veil. Your anchor does not grip the seabed but the sanctuary — it cannot drag.
2026-11-02.body_sw: Tumaini ni nanga ya roho, yenye salama, yenye nguvu, yaingiayo hata ndani ya pazia. Nanga yako haishiki mchanga wa bahari bali patakatifu — haiwezi kuburutwa.

2026-11-03.body_en: Ah, Lord God! You made the heavens and the earth — there is nothing too hard for You. Measure your impossibilities against His track record.
2026-11-03.body_sw: Ee Bwana MUNGU! Wewe umeumba mbingu na nchi — hakuna neno lililo gumu usiloliweza. Pima mambo yako yasiyowezekana kwa kumbukumbu ya matendo yake.

2026-11-04.body_en: Tribulation produces perseverance, perseverance character, and character hope — and hope does not disappoint. God wastes nothing, not even your hardest seasons.
2026-11-04.body_sw: Dhiki huleta saburi, na saburi hujenga tabia, na tabia huleta tumaini — na tumaini halitahayarishi. Mungu hapotezi kitu, hata majira yako magumu zaidi.

2026-11-05.body_en: Why are you cast down, O my soul? Hope in God, for I shall yet praise Him. Sometimes faith means preaching to yourself instead of listening to yourself.
2026-11-05.body_sw: Ee nafsi yangu, kwa nini kuinama? Umtumaini Mungu, maana nitakuja kumsifu tena. Wakati mwingine imani ni kujihubiria badala ya kujisikiliza.

2026-11-06.body_en: He gives power to the weak, and to those who have no might He increases strength. Come to Him empty today — He gives from fullness.
2026-11-06.body_sw: Huwapa nguvu wazimiao, humwongezea nguvu yeye asiyekuwa na uwezo. Mjie leo ukiwa mtupu — yeye hutoa kutoka katika ujazo.

2026-11-07.body_en: The Lord is good to those who wait for Him, to the soul who seeks Him. Waiting on God is never wasted — it is where hope takes root.
2026-11-07.body_sw: Bwana ni mwema kwa hao wamngojao, kwa nafsi imtafutayo. Kumngoja Mungu si kupoteza muda kamwe — ndipo tumaini hushika mizizi.

2026-11-08.body_en: In his deepest loss Job declared: I know that my Redeemer lives. Faith's greatest statements are often made in life's darkest rooms.
2026-11-08.body_sw: Katika hasara yake kuu Ayubu alitangaza: najua ya kuwa Mkombozi wangu yu hai. Kauli kuu za imani mara nyingi hutamkwa katika vyumba vya giza zaidi vya maisha.

2026-11-09.body_en: Our light affliction, which is but for a moment, works for us a far more exceeding and eternal weight of glory. Eternity re-prices every present pain.
2026-11-09.body_sw: Dhiki yetu nyepesi, iliyo ya muda wa kitambo tu, yatufanyia utukufu wa milele uzidio kuwa mwingi sana. Umilele hupanga upya bei ya kila maumivu ya sasa.

2026-11-10.body_en: Weeping may endure for a night, but joy comes in the morning. Night has a curfew; God's joy has a sunrise.
2026-11-10.body_sw: Huenda kilio huja kukaa usiku, lakini asubuhi huja furaha. Usiku una mwisho wake; furaha ya Mungu ina mapambazuko yake.

2026-11-11.body_en: All things work together for good to those who love God. Not all things are good — but the Weaver makes them work together for good.
2026-11-11.body_sw: Katika mambo yote Mungu hufanya kazi pamoja na wale wampendao katika kuwapatia mema. Si mambo yote ni mema — lakini Mfumaji huyafanya yafanye kazi pamoja kwa mema.

2026-11-12.body_en: Count it all joy when you fall into various trials, knowing that the testing of your faith produces patience. Trials are God's gymnasium — endurance is built there.
2026-11-12.body_sw: Hesabuni ya kuwa ni furaha tupu mkiangukia katika majaribu mbalimbali, mkifahamu ya kuwa kujaribiwa kwa imani yenu huleta saburi. Majaribu ni uwanja wa mazoezi wa Mungu — ustahimilivu hujengwa humo.

2026-11-13.body_en: The Lord is near to those who have a broken heart. Heaven's throne room has a fast lane for the crushed in spirit.
2026-11-13.body_sw: Bwana yu karibu nao waliovunjika moyo. Chumba cha enzi cha mbinguni kina njia ya haraka kwa waliopondeka roho.

2026-11-14.body_en: God gives beauty for ashes, the oil of joy for mourning. Bring Him your ashes today — the exchange counter is open.
2026-11-14.body_sw: Mungu hutoa taji ya maua badala ya majivu, mafuta ya furaha badala ya maombolezo. Mletee majivu yako leo — dirisha la kubadilishana liko wazi.

2026-11-15.body_en: God will wipe away every tear; there shall be no more death, nor sorrow, nor crying. Every present grief has an expiration date.
2026-11-15.body_sw: Mungu atafuta kila chozi; mauti haitakuwapo tena, wala maombolezo, wala kilio. Kila huzuni ya sasa ina tarehe ya kwisha.

2026-11-16.body_en: Let us hold fast the confession of our hope without wavering, for He who promised is faithful. Your grip may weaken, but the Promiser never does.
2026-11-16.body_sw: Na tulishike sana ungamo la tumaini letu, lisigeuke, maana yeye aliyeahidi ni mwaminifu. Mshiko wako waweza kudhoofika, lakini Mwenye ahadi hadhoofiki kamwe.

2026-11-17.body_en: I would have lost heart unless I had believed that I would see the goodness of the Lord in the land of the living. Expect God's goodness this side of heaven too.
2026-11-17.body_sw: Ningalikata tamaa isipokuwa naliamini ya kwamba nitauona wema wa Bwana katika nchi ya walio hai. Tarajia wema wa Mungu upande huu wa mbingu pia.

2026-11-18.title_en: I Will Look to the Lord
2026-11-18.body_en: Therefore I will look to the Lord; I will wait for the God of my salvation; my God will hear me. When everything shakes, fix your gaze — He will hear.
2026-11-18.body_sw: Lakini mimi, nitamtazamia Bwana; nitamngoja Mungu wa wokovu wangu; Mungu wangu atanisikia. Kila kitu kitikisikapo, kaza macho yako — atasikia.

2026-11-19.body_en: We are begotten again to a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ, to an inheritance incorruptible. Your inheritance is reserved in heaven — beyond theft, rust, and inflation.
2026-11-19.body_sw: Tumezaliwa mara ya pili ili tupate tumaini lenye uzima kwa kufufuka kwake Yesu Kristo, tupate urithi usioharibika. Urithi wako umehifadhiwa mbinguni — mbali na wizi, kutu, na mfumuko wa bei.

2026-11-20.body_en: In due season we shall reap if we do not lose heart. God's harvests have fixed dates that discouragement cannot see — keep sowing.
2026-11-20.body_sw: Wakati wake utafika tutakapovuna tusipozimia roho. Mavuno ya Mungu yana tarehe maalum ambazo kukata tamaa hakuwezi kuziona — endelea kupanda.

2026-11-21.body_en: Those who sow in tears shall reap in joy. Tears watering faithful seed are never wasted irrigation.
2026-11-21.body_sw: Wapandao kwa machozi watavuna kwa kelele za furaha. Machozi yanayomwagilia mbegu ya uaminifu si umwagiliaji uliopotea kamwe.

2026-11-22.body_en: The vision is yet for an appointed time; though it tarries, wait for it, because it will surely come. God's delays are appointments, not cancellations.
2026-11-22.body_sw: Maono hayo ni kwa wakati ulioamriwa; yajapokawia, yangojee, kwa kuwa hakika yatakuja. Kuchelewa kwa Mungu ni miadi, si kufutwa.

2026-11-23.body_en: Rejoice in hope, be patient in tribulation, continue steadfastly in prayer. Three commands, one lifestyle — hope, patience, prayer travel together.
2026-11-23.body_sw: Furahini katika tumaini, subirini katika dhiki, dumuni katika kuomba. Amri tatu, mtindo mmoja wa maisha — tumaini, saburi, na maombi husafiri pamoja.

2026-11-24.body_en: Do not remember the former things; behold, I will do a new thing. God's future for you is not a rerun of your past.
2026-11-24.body_sw: Msiyakumbuke mambo ya kwanza; tazama, nitatenda neno jipya. Wakati ujao wa Mungu kwako si marudio ya yaliyopita.

2026-11-25.body_en: And now, Lord, what do I wait for? My hope is in You. Strip away every lesser expectation until only He remains — that hope holds.
2026-11-25.body_sw: Na sasa, Bwana, nategemea nini? Tumaini langu ni kwako. Ondoa kila tarajio dogo hadi yeye tu abaki — tumaini hilo hushika.

2026-11-26.body_en: Remember that the Lord your God led you all the way these forty years in the wilderness. Reviewing God's faithfulness behind you builds hope for what is ahead.
2026-11-26.body_sw: Utaikumbuka njia ile yote Bwana, Mungu wako, aliyokuongoza miaka hii arobaini nyikani. Kupitia uaminifu wa Mungu nyuma yako hujenga tumaini kwa yaliyo mbele.

2026-11-27.body_en: At that time I will bring you back — I will make you a name and a praise among all peoples. God writes homecoming into the end of His people's story.
2026-11-27.body_sw: Wakati ule nitawaleta tena — nitawafanya kuwa jina na sifa kati ya mataifa yote. Mungu huandika kurudi nyumbani mwishoni mwa hadithi ya watu wake.

2026-11-28.body_en: The eye of the Lord is on those who hope in His mercy. While you wait for Him, He is watching over you — the waiting is mutual attention.
2026-11-28.body_sw: Jicho la Bwana li kwao wamchao, wazingojeao fadhili zake. Unapomngoja, yeye anakuangalia — kungoja ni kuangaliana.

2026-11-29.title_en: Let Not Your Heart Be Troubled
2026-11-29.body_en: I go to prepare a place for you, and I will come again and receive you to Myself. The Carpenter of Nazareth is building your forever home.
2026-11-29.body_sw: Naenda kuwaandalia mahali, nami nitakuja tena niwakaribishe kwangu. Seremala wa Nazareti anajenga makao yako ya milele.

2026-11-30.body_en: I wait for the Lord more than those who watch for the morning. The watchman's dawn always comes — and so does the Lord's answer.
2026-11-30.body_sw: Nafsi yangu inamngoja Bwana kuliko walinzi waingojao asubuhi. Mapambazuko ya mlinzi huja daima — na jibu la Bwana pia.

2026-12-01.body_en: We look for the blessed hope and glorious appearing of our great God and Saviour Jesus Christ. Advent is not only a memory — it is an appointment.
2026-12-01.body_sw: Tukilitazamia tumaini lenye baraka na mafunuo ya utukufu wa Mungu mkuu na Mwokozi wetu Yesu Kristo. Ujio si kumbukumbu tu — ni miadi.

2026-12-02.body_en: The virgin shall conceive and bear a Son, and shall call His name Immanuel — God with us. The whole gospel is in that one name: God did not stay distant.
2026-12-02.body_sw: Bikira atachukua mimba, atazaa mtoto mwanamume, naye atamwita jina lake Imanueli — Mungu pamoja nasi. Injili yote imo katika jina hilo moja: Mungu hakubaki mbali.

2026-12-03.body_en: Out of little Bethlehem came the Ruler whose goings forth are from everlasting. God delights to bring the eternal out of the unnoticed.
2026-12-03.body_sw: Kutoka Bethlehemu ndogo alitoka Mtawala ambaye matokeo yake yamekuwa tangu zamani za milele. Mungu hufurahia kutoa cha milele kutoka kisichoonekana.

2026-12-04.body_en: The angel announced good tidings of great joy for all people: a Saviour is born. Christmas is heaven's news bulletin — and it is still good news.
2026-12-04.body_sw: Malaika alitangaza habari njema ya furaha kuu kwa watu wote: Mwokozi amezaliwa. Kuzaliwa kwa Yesu ni tangazo la habari la mbinguni — na bado ni habari njema.

2026-12-05.body_en: The Word became flesh and dwelt among us, and we beheld His glory. God translated Himself into a language every human can read: a life.
2026-12-05.body_sw: Neno alifanyika mwili, akakaa kwetu, nasi tukauona utukufu wake. Mungu alijitafsiri katika lugha kila mwanadamu awezayo kusoma: maisha.

2026-12-06.title_en: Unto Us a Child Is Born
2026-12-06.body_en: Unto us a Child is born — Wonderful, Counsellor, Mighty God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace. Every title answers a human need; every need finds its answer in Him.
2026-12-06.body_sw: Maana kwa ajili yetu mtoto amezaliwa — Mshauri wa ajabu, Mungu mwenye nguvu, Baba wa milele, Mfalme wa amani. Kila cheo hujibu hitaji la mwanadamu; kila hitaji hupata jibu lake ndani yake.

2026-12-07.body_en: You shall call His name Jesus, for He will save His people from their sins. His name is His mission — salvation was the plan from the first breath.
2026-12-07.body_sw: Utamwita jina lake Yesu, maana yeye ndiye atakayewaokoa watu wake na dhambi zao. Jina lake ni utume wake — wokovu ulikuwa mpango tangu pumzi ya kwanza.

2026-12-08.body_en: When the fullness of the time had come, God sent forth His Son. Heaven's clock never runs late — not for Bethlehem, and not for your prayers.
2026-12-08.body_sw: Ulipowadia utimilifu wa wakati, Mungu alimtuma Mwanawe. Saa ya mbinguni haichelewi kamwe — si kwa Bethlehemu, wala si kwa maombi yako.

2026-12-09.body_en: For with God nothing will be impossible. The angel said it to Mary about a miracle — the words still apply to yours.
2026-12-09.body_sw: Kwa kuwa hakuna neno lisilowezekana kwa Mungu. Malaika alimwambia Mariamu kuhusu muujiza — maneno hayo bado yanahusu wako.

2026-12-10.body_en: The wise men rejoiced, fell down, and worshiped, opening their treasures. Wisdom still travels any distance to kneel before Jesus.
2026-12-10.body_sw: Mamajusi walifurahia furaha kubwa mno, wakaanguka wakamsujudia, wakafungua hazina zao. Hekima bado husafiri umbali wowote kupiga magoti mbele za Yesu.

2026-12-11.body_en: The God of heaven will set up a kingdom which shall never be destroyed. Empires rise and fall on schedule — His kingdom has no expiry.
2026-12-11.body_sw: Mungu wa mbinguni atausimamisha ufalme usioharibika milele. Falme huinuka na kuanguka kwa ratiba — ufalme wake hauna mwisho.

2026-12-12.title_en: The Gospel to All the World
2026-12-12.body_en: This gospel of the kingdom will be preached in all the world as a witness, and then the end will come. Every act of witness moves the clock of history.
2026-12-12.body_sw: Habari njema ya ufalme itahubiriwa katika ulimwengu wote, kuwa ushuhuda kwa mataifa yote; hapo ndipo ule mwisho utakapokuja. Kila tendo la ushuhuda husogeza saa ya historia.

2026-12-13.body_en: Behold, I am coming quickly, and My reward is with Me. The last chapters of the Bible pulse with urgency — live ready.
2026-12-13.body_sw: Tazama, naja upesi, na ujira wangu u pamoja nami. Sura za mwisho za Biblia zinadunda kwa uharaka — ishi ukiwa tayari.

2026-12-14.body_en: Watch therefore, for you do not know what hour your Lord is coming. Readiness is not panic — it is a lamp kept burning.
2026-12-14.body_sw: Kesheni basi, kwa maana hamjui ni siku ipi atakayokuja Bwana wenu. Kuwa tayari si hofu — ni taa inayoendelea kuwaka.

2026-12-15.body_en: The Lord Himself will descend from heaven with a shout, and the dead in Christ will rise. The reunion of all reunions is on heaven's calendar.
2026-12-15.body_sw: Bwana mwenyewe atashuka kutoka mbinguni pamoja na mwaliko, nao waliokufa katika Kristo watafufuliwa. Mkutano wa mikutano yote umo katika kalenda ya mbinguni.

2026-12-16.body_en: If I go and prepare a place for you, I will come again. His return is as certain as His departure — He keeps His word.
2026-12-16.body_sw: Nikienda na kuwaandalia mahali, nitakuja tena. Kurudi kwake ni hakika kama kuondoka kwake — hushika neno lake.

2026-12-17.body_en: This same Jesus will so come in like manner as you saw Him go into heaven. Not a different Christ, not a symbol — the same Jesus, visibly returning.
2026-12-17.body_sw: Huyu Yesu atakuja jinsi iyo hiyo mlivyomwona akienda zake mbinguni. Si Kristo mwingine, si ishara — Yesu yule yule, akirudi kwa kuonekana.

2026-12-18.body_en: Behold, He is coming with clouds, and every eye will see Him. His return will be the most public event in history — no one will miss it.
2026-12-18.body_sw: Tazama, yuaja na mawingu, na kila jicho litamwona. Kurudi kwake kutakuwa tukio la wazi zaidi katika historia — hakuna atakayelikosa.

2026-12-19.body_en: The Lord is not slack concerning His promise, but is longsuffering, not willing that any should perish. The delay you wonder about is mercy for someone still coming.
2026-12-19.body_sw: Bwana hakawii kuitimiza ahadi yake, bali huvumilia, maana hapendi mtu yeyote apotee. Kuchelewa unakokustaajabia ni rehema kwa mtu ambaye bado anakuja.

2026-12-20.body_en: When these things begin to happen, look up and lift up your heads, because your redemption draws near. World news that frightens others should raise the believer's gaze.
2026-12-20.body_sw: Mambo hayo yaanzapo kutokea, changamkeni, mkaviinue vichwa vyenu, kwa kuwa ukombozi wenu umekaribia. Habari za dunia zinazowatisha wengine zapaswa kuinua macho ya muumini.

2026-12-21.body_en: It will be said in that day: behold, this is our God; we have waited for Him and He will save us. Rehearse now the sentence you will say then.
2026-12-21.body_sw: Katika siku hiyo itanenwa: tazama, huyu ndiye Mungu wetu; tumemngoja naye atatuokoa. Fanya mazoezi sasa ya sentensi utakayosema siku ile.

2026-12-22.body_en: To you who fear My name the Sun of Righteousness shall arise with healing in His wings. History's darkest hour precedes its brightest dawn.
2026-12-22.body_sw: Kwenu ninyi mnaolicha jina langu, jua la haki litawazukia, lenye kuponya katika mbawa zake. Saa ya giza zaidi ya historia hutangulia mapambazuko yake angavu zaidi.

2026-12-23.body_en: Behold, I am coming quickly! Hold fast what you have, that no one may take your crown. Perseverance now is coronation later.
2026-12-23.body_sw: Tazama, naja upesi! Shika sana ulicho nacho, asije mtu akaitwaa taji yako. Ustahimilivu wa sasa ni kutawazwa baadaye.

2026-12-24.title_en: Glory to God in the Highest
2026-12-24.body_en: Suddenly a multitude of the heavenly host praised God: glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace. The first Christmas concert had an angel choir — join the song tonight.
2026-12-24.body_sw: Ghafula palikuwa na jeshi la mbinguni likimsifu Mungu: utukufu kwa Mungu juu mbinguni, na duniani amani. Tamasha la kwanza la kuzaliwa kwake lilikuwa na kwaya ya malaika — jiunge na wimbo usiku huu.

2026-12-25.body_en: She laid Him in a manger, because there was no room for them in the inn. The question of Bethlehem is still today's question: is there room for Him in your life?
2026-12-25.body_sw: Akamlaza horini, kwa sababu hawakupata nafasi katika nyumba ya wageni. Swali la Bethlehemu bado ni swali la leo: yupo nafasi kwa ajili yake maishani mwako?

2026-12-26.body_en: God has highly exalted Him and given Him the name above every name. The manger led to a cross, and the cross to a throne — every knee will bow.
2026-12-26.body_sw: Mungu alimwadhimisha mno, akamkirimia Jina lile lipitalo kila jina. Hori iliongoza msalabani, na msalaba katika kiti cha enzi — kila goti litapigwa.

2026-12-27.body_en: I saw a new heaven and a new earth — and God Himself will be with them and be their God. The Bible ends where Eden began: God at home with humanity.
2026-12-27.body_sw: Nikaona mbingu mpya na nchi mpya — na Mungu mwenyewe atakuwa pamoja nao na kuwa Mungu wao. Biblia inaishia pale Edeni ilipoanzia: Mungu akikaa na wanadamu.

2026-12-28.body_en: He who testifies to these things says: surely I am coming quickly. Amen. Even so, come, Lord Jesus! The Bible's last prayer can be your daily one.
2026-12-28.body_sw: Yeye mwenye kuyashuhudia haya asema: naam, naja upesi. Amina. Na uje, Bwana Yesu! Ombi la mwisho la Biblia laweza kuwa lako la kila siku.

2026-12-29.title_en: Our Dwelling Place in All Generations
2026-12-29.body_en: Lord, You have been our dwelling place in all generations — from everlasting to everlasting, You are God. As the year closes, remember: times change, God does not.
2026-12-29.body_sw: Bwana, wewe umekuwa makao yetu vizazi vyote — tangu milele hata milele wewe ndiwe Mungu. Mwaka unapofungwa, kumbuka: nyakati hubadilika, Mungu habadiliki.

2026-12-30.title_en: Ebenezer — Thus Far the Lord Has Helped
2026-12-30.body_en: Samuel set up a stone and called it Ebenezer: thus far the Lord has helped us. Look back over this year and set up your own stone of remembrance.
2026-12-30.body_sw: Samweli akasimamisha jiwe akaliita jina lake Ebenezeri, akisema: hata hapa Bwana ametusaidia. Tazama nyuma mwaka huu na usimamishe jiwe lako la ukumbusho.

2026-12-31.body_en: You crown the year with Your goodness, and Your paths drip with abundance. Close the year counting crowns, not losses — His goodness framed every month.
2026-12-31.body_sw: Umeuvika mwaka taji ya wema wako, na mapito yako yadondoza unono. Funga mwaka ukihesabu taji, si hasara — wema wake uliuzunguka kila mwezi.
